finalized_plan.description: Use the inspect_file_as_text tool to retrieve the transcription of the audio file located at data/gaia/validation/1f975693-876d-457b-a649-393859e79bf3.mp3
Review the transcription to locate all instances where page numbers are mentioned by Professor Willowbrook
Extract the page numbers from the transcription, ensuring only the relevant numbers intended for the calculus mid-term reading material are captured
Convert the extracted page numbers into a comma-delimited list and sort them in ascending order

Compose the final answer, ensuring it has three parts: (a) a short version of the task outcome (listing just the comma-delimited page numbers), (b) an extremely detailed version explaining the transcription, extraction, and sorting process, and (c) any additional context that may be relevant to understanding the answer
Use the final_answer tool to deliver the final structured answer
